hypotheses.name: 3-phase sprint works across project types
hypotheses.evidence: Second implementation sprint completed cleanly: THINK (plan mode with Gherkin AC) → EXECUTE (sequential build with continuous /gate) → SHIP. All deliverables produced, all gates passing.

hypotheses.name: Gates catch real issues
hypotheses.evidence: All 4 gates passed on first run. Gates verified 100% coverage across 3 packages (region, privacy, testing), 0 lint errors. The continuous gate strategy (run after every change) meant no issues accumulated.

hypotheses.name: Skills are followed by agents
hypotheses.evidence: 5/5 H7 audit items passed. Tests assert behavior not implementation (accept/reject outcomes, score values). Hostile input tested (empty labels, missing labels, special chars). No side effects (pure label reads). Rejection messages include actionable fix suggestions. Adversarial scenarios exist (empty region, wiped=false, different org, special chars).

hypotheses.name: Flowstate works for greenfield projects
hypotheses.evidence: Third sprint on greenfield Go/k8s project. Sprint 1 baseline directly guided scope. Roadmap phase accurately described deliverables. Process friction-free.

hypotheses.name: Skills generalize across languages
hypotheses.evidence: All 5 skill perspectives applied to Go scheduler plugins without modification. Security-auditor hostile input testing, production-engineer behavior-focused tests, architect interface isolation — all directly relevant to k8s plugin code.
